name: add_task
description: Add a new task to the journal database

parameters.title: str - Title of the task (required)
parameters.due_date: str - Due date in format DD/MM/YYYY (optional)
parameters.completed: bool - Whether the task is completed (default: False)

name: list_tasks
description: Retrieve all tasks from the journal database with optional filtering

parameters.due_before: str - Filter tasks due before this date (optional)
parameters.due_after: str - Filter tasks due after this date (optional)

name: mark_task_completed
description: Mark a task as completed or incomplete in the database

parameters.task_id: int - The ID of the task (required)
parameters.completed: bool - True to mark as completed, False to mark as incomplete (default: True)

name: add_class_session
description: Add a class session to the weekly schedule. Classes cannot overlap.

parameters.start_time: str - Start time in HH:MM format (required)
parameters.end_time: str - End time in HH:MM format (required)

name: list_class_schedule
description: Retrieve the class schedule with optional filtering

parameters.day_of_week: str - Filter by day of week (optional)
